message: Morning team! Anyone else need a triple espresso today?
You're not the only one Bez! The reports from last week are still giving me nightmares.
Tell me about it Tinus.
But hey at least it's sunny outside today. :sunrise:
True a little sunshine makes everything better.
Also I'm having my usual green smoothie. That's my secret energy booster.
Nice Bez! I'll stick with my coffee though.
Anyone else excited for the launch of the new BitCoin :coin: payment feature this week?
Absolutely Daniel! Been looking forward to it.
By the way no spoilers but did anyone catch the football game? Epic comeback!
I missed it! I was knee deep in a sci-fi novel. Anyone else into that?
Oh I love sci-fi! Can you share the name of the book Shay?
I've been reading a bit of sci-fi myself.
Looking forward to sharing recommendations Shay!
There's always so much happening outside of work! Keep the energy :battery: going team.
It's going to be another productive day. :raised_hands:

Welcome to The Chain the responsibility is on you to size up the problem.

? *Use `/help` at any time for a list of useful links and commands*
 ? *Use `/incident` to create an incident record*

Once you're ready just click start to begin
Hey we're getting reports of customers struggling to make purchases
@here Anyone else seeing this?
Yes I've noticed the same @Bob . It seems like an error in the system
Whatever it is we need to sort it out quickly.
we need to step on it! before the social media backlash is turning into a storm.
Who is handling incidents today? Please size up the issue this is urgent
I'll handle it.
:star: Take command
*Incident Number INC100040:*
:star: Incident record created
:star: Send first comms in first 5 minutes
Is it a global or regional issue ?
@tinus can you start working with Bob find out what errors are happening on the customer side?
:star: Form an effective investigation team
@bob Do we know if customers are having trouble just in certain regions or is this a global issue?
:star: Asking questions to validate impact of the problem
I got to go with Bez on an important discussion. I'll pull in Bob to give you info around same
Sure i can help
Thank you.
Getting over 120+ reports looks like customers unable to make payments
Looks like a European issue
Okay so issue seems to be just Europe right now. Let's start there.
:star: Qualify the problem
Wait just checked this again. The reports are now global. Initially it started with Bitcoin payment failures in EU region only
@bez this appears to just be a Europe issue.
@bob so to clarify it started as Bitcoin problems for Europe but now is impacting all customers globally?
Right and now none of the payment methods are working
Okay thank you for the clarification.
I'm getting lot of reports now. What shall i convey to customers ?
@bob we can let them know that we are experiencing problems taking payments and are working to fix.
Sure thanks
Any new updates ?
@hamed are you around?
Yes i am
@hamed can you start looking at logs to see where our payment system is failing? Customers are unable to make payments.
I can pull in Tanya with me to check into infra. Meanwhile it'd be good to include someone from app team. Could be some app issue
:star: Facts over opinion
Here are the recent changes : https://uptime-labs.atlassian.net/wiki/external/MjMxNGU0ZjU1ZTVhNDA0NWJmY2M1NjU1OGFiMGY2YjA
@bez Yes we now know that all customers cannot make payments. I have pulled in the Platform Team to start investigating and Bob is fielding customer reports.
I can see payment pod is not running. Trying to bring it back again
@daniel can you lend us a hand? Customers can't make payments. Hamed and Tanya are investigating but we could use your help.
:star: Escalating when required
Sure let me check the logs
I'm seeing below errors in payment service \n[ERROR]
Restart isn't working
There seems to be an error coming up from cart service which act as an upstream for payments
[WARN]
I can see a latest change was around payments
This is worst. How fast can we come back online for the payments ?
I need some ideas folks. If cart service is broken we need to get that to a usable state first before payments will even start. Am I right?
:star: Restoration over root cause analysis
I have got a theory. Why not we check the changes by asking the timeline around customer reports
Yeah Tanya's correct
@bez we're still trying to find the bug - unfortunately all the latest changes to the payment system are related to the new Bitcoin payments so rolling back would eliminate that option.
:star: Reviewed changes
@bob when did we start getting reports from customers about payment problems?
The first report came around 2 hrs ago with intermittent failures in payment
This looks like a payments change causing an issue
Latest change was in payments app around 2 hrs ago
@tanya can we rollback or will that break the new Bitcoin checkout?
Good to point out @joe.muller-sonic.com i'm seeing errors in cart service and payments as well
This looks like a cascading failure
If we look at the change's decsription then there are total 3 changes mentioning bitcoin
Correct and the issue first started with bitcoin failures
@hamed is it a simple failure or do we need to rollback the cart service changes?
We should get the whole bitcoin feature rolled back across 3 services - payment service cart service and cart redis
@bez we're still investigating - we have expanded scope to both the Cart and Payment services
These are 3 changes for bitcoin : \nCHG89777 CHG89778 CHG89779
@hamed can you rollback those changes now?
It must be done in backward fashion
Starting with CHG89779
Okay @tanya can you rollback CHG89779
Daniel could help us as well
@daniel let's get the Bitcoin changes rolled back - Hamed says they are CHG89777 CHG89778 CHG89779
Yes i can rollback my payments change CHG89779
I'll do for CHG89777
I can do CHG89778
Payments have been rolled back
Okay one at a time please.
Rolling back cart redis now
done
Doing it for cart service now
Do we have an ETA for the fix ?
Rollbacks are completed
Done
Great i've also restarted the frontend so the website should be working now
@joe.muller-sonic.com can you confirm?
@daniel are you sure? I'm getting a cart error when I visit the site.
:star: Cross checking resolution with team
Can see the same error
Have we restarted the frontend properly after clearing redis cache ?
@bez we just rolled back the most recent changes - currently working with platform team to make sure the website is stable.
:star: Confirm resolution with the business
Sorry i did it now
I can see the website back again
Can confirm. Website is loading again.
:star: Validate the fix
I can see it back again as well
Payments appear to be working.

Thank you for playing The Chain We recommend that you take 5 minutes to go and get a drink or stretch your legs.\nOnce you are back we ask that you complete this retrospective and feedback form just hit start when you are ready.
@bob how are things looking on your end? Customers happy other than missing the Bitcoin payments?
Update me once you've got confirmation
:star: Cross check resolution with stakeholders
No new complaints. Order metrics are going up
@bez this is now fixed. It seems we were not ready to rollout Bitcoin payments - platform and software team will need to test more thoroughly before we try again.
Excellent. Thank you Bob.
Thanks for playing! Please complete your feedback here:\nhttps://learn.uptimelabs.io/scenario/online-boutique/levels/8/7688/feedback\n"
